name: Pier House Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup key lime or Persian lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks on high speed until thick and light in color.
3. Turn off the mixer and add the condensed milk, mixing on low speed.
4. Still on low speed, add half the lime juice, cream of tartar, and then the remaining lime juice. Mix until blended.
5. Pour into prepared crust and bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until the center is firm and dry to the touch.
6. Freeze for at least 3 hours before topping with meringue.
7. To make meringue, heat the egg whites and sugar in the top of a double boiler, stirring frequently, until they reach 110°F.
8. Beat on high speed until stiff peaks are formed.
9. Top the frozen pie and return it to the freezer until ready to serve. It keeps for several days. Serves 8 to 10.
